description_long: This object is a medium-sized wooden storage chest with a curved, barrel-like lid and reinforced black metal bands along its edges. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance, while the black metal frame adds structural support and a touch of contrast. On the front, there is a prominent metal ring handle and a simple decorative pattern above it, suggesting a functional yet ornamental design. The chest appears to have a hinged lid, with small metallic hinges visible at the back. The overall construction suggests it is designed to securely store items, possibly valuables or tools, in an urban or residential setting. The surfaces are mostly matte with a slightly rough wood texture and a hard tactile feel.
description: A medium wooden storage chest with a curved lid, black metal reinforcements, and a front metal ring handle. The wood grain and decorative details give it a rustic, sturdy look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved wooden lid, black metal frame, and the main latch area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the end of the curved lid, black metal banding, and a visible metal ring handle with a decorative pattern above it.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood grain, black metal frame, and two small metallic hinges for the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the metal ring handle and decorative pattern.
